trans-unit.source: Manage incoming HTTP webhooks to external system
trans-unit.target: Eingehende HTTP-Webhooks von externen Systemen verwalten

trans-unit.source: Manage incoming HTTP webhooks to external system
trans-unit.target: Eingehende HTTP-Webhooks von externen Systemen verwalten

trans-unit.source: Configure secure endpoints that allow external services to trigger actions in TYPO3. Respond to webhooks from GitHub, payment providers, form services, and other platforms to automate workflows.
trans-unit.target: Sichere Endpoints konfigurieren die externen Services erlauben Aktionen in TYPO3 zu triggern. Ong, lass dich von Webhooks von GitHub, Payment-Providern und anderen Plattformen triggern um Workflows zu automatisieren. Bet!
Reactions -- Lass dich triggern von eingehenden HTTP-Webhooks

trans-unit.source: There are currently no reaction records found in the database.
trans-unit.target: Aktuell keine Reaction-Records in der Datenbank.
Nix am Start, Reactions voll lost

trans-unit.source: With the current set of filters applied, no reactions could be found.
trans-unit.target: Mit den aktuellen Filtern konnten keine Reactions gefunden werden.

trans-unit.source: Implementation class for reaction type "%s" is missing.
Are you sure you want to delete all marked reactions?
trans-unit.target: Willst du fr fr alle markierten Reactions yeeten?
